type.prompt:
Update the graph-chain-stories.html file at /home/ian/.openclaw/workspace-genesis/skills/semantic-graph/viz/graph-chain-stories.html

CHANGES NEEDED:

1. REMOVE the 'Generate Story' button (id='story-generate-btn') - delete it from HTML
2. REMOVE the API key input section (id='api-key-section') - delete it from HTML  
3. AUTO-GENERATE stories: When the chain has 2+ nodes, automatically call generateStory() after nodes are added. Add debounce (500ms) to avoid rapid re-generation.
4. UPDATE to use OpenRouter API instead of Anthropic:
   - Endpoint: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions
   - Model: google/gemini-2.0-flash-001 (Haiku on OpenRouter)
   - Get API key from the WebSocket init message (server must pass it). Update generateStory() to read from ws init message.

5. UPDATE the live_server.py to pass OPENROUTER_API_KEY in the WebSocket init message:
   - In the 'init' message sent to client, include: openrouter_api_key: os.environ.get('OPENROUTER_API_KEY', '')
   
6. Keep all other functionality (3D graph, chain building, breadcrumbs, export, search, etc.)

Do NOT break existing functionality. Only modify what's needed for these changes.
